data.name: ARRANQUE_WO_ROJO_INFO
data.value: The MES System has detected that the start of the WO has not been carried out correctly as there are productions not assigned to WO

data.name: ARRANQUE_WO_VERDE_INFO
data.value: The start of the WO has been successful

data.name: FINALIZACION_WO_ROJO_INFO
data.value: The MES System has detected that the completion of the WO has not been carried out correctly due to having, productions or WO, active at unplanned time

data.name: FINALIZACION_WO_VERDE_INFO
data.value: The completion of the WO has been successful

data.name: TURNO_AMARILLO_INFO
data.value: It appears when a counter of a machine has been at zero throughout the shift, that is, it indicates that the counter of a machine has not worked correctly. It is solved by putting the meter or meters in question into operation. Only displayed if the result of the turn evaluation results in a Light Green or a Dark Green

data.name: TURNO_AZUL_INFO
data.value: There are productions in some machine without assigning to any WO. It is solved by assigning these productions to the corresponding WOs. It can be hidden behind the Dark Green color if the Filler and Pallet Labeller have the WOs correctly assigned

data.name: TURNO_GRIS_INFO
data.value: There is a missing record of the consolidated time of a machine, it may be due to a problem with the System. It is solved by pressing the "Add Records" button in the "Summary" tab of each shift. Prevails over any other color

data.name: TURNO_ROJO_INFO
data.value: There are productions in the Filler or Pallet Labeller in unplanned time. It is solved by planning those time slots and assigning them to a WO or setting those productions to zero manually. Prevails over any other color except Gray

data.name: TURNO_VERDE_INFO
data.value: The productions of all the machines are correctly assigned to WO, etc. It is the ideal state of the turn. In this state all the data generated and sent to QLIK is correct if the quantities of the counters are real. This color can be hidden behind the yellow color if there is a damaged counter of a machine

data.name: TURNO_VERDE_OSCURO_INFO
data.value: The productions of the Filler and Pallet Labeller of the line are correctly assigned to WO, etc., although there are machines whose status is not correct. This color can be hidden behind the yellow color if there is a damaged counter of a machine

data.name: PLANIFICADOR_HORAS_TIEMPO_INICIAL_HINT

data.name: BLOQUEO_CUARENTENA_INFO
data.value: C: Quarantine. Counts as production and for the TC

data.name: BLOQUEO_DESTRUCCION_INFO
data.value: D: Destruction. Counts as production and for the TC

data.name: BLOQUEO_LIBERADO_INFO
data.value: L: Released. Counts as production and for the TC

data.name: BLOQUEO_NO_CONFORME_INFO
data.value: N: Non-compliant. Counts as production and is deducted from the TC

data.name: BLOQUEO_RETENIDO_INFO
data.value: R: Retained. Counts as production and for the TC

data.name: ESTADO_ANULADA_INFO
data.value: CANCELLED MES: Label canceled in MES. Does not count as production

data.name: ESTADO_CORRECTA_INFO
data.value: CORRECT MES AND JDE: Label obtained from SIGI and confirmed in JDE. Counts as production

data.name: ESTADO_ELIMINADA_INFO
data.value: DELETED JDE: Label deleted in JDE. Does not count as production

data.name: ESTADO_ESPERA_INFO
data.value: ON HOLD: Label obtained from SIGI and pending confirmation in JDE. Does not count as production

data.name: ESTADO_HABILITADA_INFO
data.value: ENABLED MES: Label enabled in MES. Counts as production

data.name: ESTADO_IMPORTADA_INFO
data.value: IMPORTED MES: Label imported in MES. Counts as production
